WhatsApp is not configured yet

Your administrator must set up the WhatsApp server in System Configuration before messages can be sent.

WhatsApp server not configured

Your WhatsApp is not connected

Open the Connection tab and scan the QR code with your phone to link your WhatsApp account.

This QR links your WhatsApp only — other users have separate sessions.

Click Scan QR to connect your WhatsApp.

How to connect

  1. Ensure an admin has configured the WhatsApp server in System Configuration.
  2. Click Scan QR above.
  3. On your phone: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device.
  4. Scan the QR code — status will show Connected when ready.

Digital Card Access Required

              Once enabled, you can create, customize, and share your card from this section.
            

          

          

            
What you can do

            
    
              
  1. 1. Click Request Access below to send a message to your administrator.
    2. 
              
  2. 2. Wait for admin approval (Manage Managers → Digital Card toggle).
    3. 
              
  3. 3. Return here to set up your visiting card and preview it.
    4.

System Configuration

            

              Global integration settings. Managers and advisors use these automatically — they cannot view or edit credentials here.
            

          

          Admin Only
        


        

          
WhatsApp server not configured

          

            Enter the WhatsApp microservice URL and secret token below, then click Save & Test Connection.
            Each user links their own WhatsApp account from the WhatsApp → Connection tab after this is saved.
          

        


        

          
WhatsApp Server (Infrastructure)

          
Global engine settings in Firestore (system_settings/whatsapp). User-specific WhatsApp accounts are linked separately via QR in the WhatsApp module.

            

              
              
              

              

                Local: http://localhost:3001 or HTTPS if dashboard uses HTTPS.
              

            

            

              
              
              

              
Must match WA_SECRET on the WhatsApp server (npm start).

            

            
            

        

      

      

      
      


        
        

          


            
            

              
            


            
Admin Access Required

            

              API keys are encrypted and PIN-protected. Enter your 4–8 digit admin PIN to unlock.
            


            
            

              
              

                
                
              

              

                Incorrect PIN. Please try again.
              

              
            


            
            

              

                Security note: A new PIN will re-encrypt all saved keys. Existing encrypted data will be cleared.
              

              

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  
                  
                

                

              

              

                
                
              

            


          

        



        
        


          
          

            

              

                
                API Configuration
              

              

                Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage. They are never saved in plain text.
              

            

            

              
                
                Encrypted Session
              
              
            

          


          
          

            
            

              RBAC — Admin Only: This section is protected by the admin PIN. Each key value is encrypted using
              AES-256-GCM with a PBKDF2-derived key before being stored in Firestore.
              The raw keys are only visible during this unlocked session and are never persisted in plaintext.
              Values shown as •••••• are already saved (click the eye icon to reveal).
            

          


          
          


            
            

              

                
                SMS / OTP — Twilio
              

              

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

              

            


            
            

              

                
                Email Service — SendGrid
              

              

                
                

                  
                  
                  
                

              

            


            
            

              

                
                Payment Gateway — Razorpay
              

              

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

              

            


            
            

              

                
                Third-Party Services
              

              

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

              

              

                

                  
                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

                

              

            


            
            

              

                
                
                Firebase Configuration
                Firestore / Auth / Storage
              


              

                These are your Firebase project credentials. They are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage.
                If you rotate these keys, update the Firebase console and re-save here.

Commission Settings

            

              Set advisor, manager override, and manager direct incentive percentages per product.
              These are applied automatically when the admin approves a closed sale.
            

          

          
        


        
        

          

            Advisor %
            % of premium paid to the advisor
          

          

            Manager Override %
            % of advisor commission (advisor sales only)
          

          

            Manager Direct %
            % of premium for manager direct sales
          

        


        
        

          Product Category
          Advisor %
          Override %
          Direct %
          Preview
        


        
        

          Vehicle products (Two-wheeler, Four-wheeler) have dedicated commission rows.
          They appear automatically once added to Product Settings.
        


        
        

          

            Loading product categories…
          

        


        
        

          
How commission is calculated:

          

            
Scenario A — Advisor sale:

            
1. Advisor Commission = Premium × (Advisor % ÷ 100)

            
2. Manager Override = Advisor Commission × (Manager Override % ÷ 100)

            
Scenario B — Manager direct sale:

            
1. Manager Direct Incentive = Premium × (Manager Direct % ÷ 100)

            
2. Advisor commission and manager override are not applied.

            
Example (Advisor sale): Premium ₹50,000 · Advisor 10% · Override 5%

            
→ Advisor earns ₹5,000 · Manager earns ₹250 (5% of ₹5,000)

            
Example (Direct sale): Premium ₹50,000 · Direct 14%

            
→ Manager earns ₹7,000 · Advisor earns ₹0

App Management

            

              Upload or build the mobile APK. Users download it from the profile menu.
            

          

          Admin Only
        


        


          
          


            
            

              

                
                APK Upload Server
              

              

                Run npm run start:apk locally.
                Default token: futureshield-apk-secret
              

              

                
                
                

              

              

                
                
                

              

              
              

            


            
            

              

                
                Upload New APK
              

              

                File is saved as public/downloads/future-shield.apk and served at
                /downloads/future-shield.apk.
              

              
              
              

              
              

                

                  

                

                
Uploading…

              

              
            

          


          
          


            
            

              

                
Current APK Status

                
              

              

                

                  

                  

                    
Checking…

                    

                  

                

                

                  

                    
File size

                    
—

                  

                  

                    
Last updated

                    
—

                  

                

                

                  
Public download link

                  

                    /downloads/future-shield.apk
                    
                      Test Download
                    
                  

                

              

            


            
            

              

                
                Automated Build (Capacitor)
              

              

                Build an APK from your dashboard HTML without Android Studio manually.
                Requires Java JDK 17+ and Android SDK (ANDROID_HOME).
              

              
    
                
  1. First-time setup: npm run setup:mobile
    2. 
                
  2. Build & deploy APK: npm run build:apk
    3. 
                
  3. Output → public/downloads/future-shield.apk
    4. 
                
  4. Commit the APK file and redeploy to Vercel/Netlify
    5. 
              

              

                The build script copies index.html into the Capacitor project, runs Gradle, and moves the APK automatically.
              

            


          

        

      

      


      
      


        
        

          

            
Role Permissions

            

              Control which features Managers can access. Changes apply immediately — the manager's
              UI is updated in real-time via a live Firestore listener.
            

          

          

            
              Manager Role
            
            
              Live sync
            
          

        


        
        

          
          

            Admins always have full access — these settings apply exclusively to
            the Manager role. Disabling a module hides its sidebar link and blocks navigation to
            that section. Disabling an action hides its button from the Manager's UI.

Product Settings

            

              Manage insurance products, incentive rates, and per-product sub-categories for the lead form.
            

          

          
        


        
        

          
            Total: 0
          
          
            Active: 0
          
          
            Inactive: 0
          
        


        
        

          

            

              
Product Sub-Categories

              

                Link sub-categories to each product below (e.g. Health → Individual Health, Family Floater;
                Vehicle → 2-Wheeler, 4-Wheeler). They appear automatically on the Add Lead form when that product is selected.
              

            

            Admin Only
          

        


        
        

          

            

              

                
              

              
Loading product categories…

            

          

        


        
        

          Data Integrity: Removing a product category performs a
          soft-delete — the record is marked deleted: true in Firestore instead of being
          permanently erased. This preserves all historical lead records that reference the category.
          Inactive products are hidden from the lead capture dropdown but retained in the database.
        


      

      

    

    

  

  

  
  



  
  

    


      

        

          
Sale Confirmation

          

            Confirm the sold product and premium before submitting for admin approval
          

        

        
      


      

        
        
        
        

        
        

          
Lead Summary

          

          

          

        


        
        

          

            Is the sold product the same as the initial lead product?
          

          

            
            
          

        


        
        

          

            
            
            

          

          

            
            
            

          

        


        
        

          
          

            ₹
            
          

          

        


        
        

          
          
          
Required for renewal tracking (365-day policy).

          

        


        

          
          

            A closed sale record will be created with the final product and premium details.
            Admin approval is required before commissions are counted.
          

        

      


      

        
        
      

    

  

  

  
  

    

      

        
Keep Original Lead?

        
Review how to handle the original lead after the sale is submitted.

      

      

        

          Do you want to keep the original lead record in the leads list?
        

        
    
          
  • Yes — Lead stays unchanged in your list
    • 
          
  • No — Lead is archived; closed sale record is submitted for approval
    • 
        

        

      

      

        
        
        
      

    

  



  
  

    


      

        

          

            
            Reject Lead Approval
          

          
Lead will revert to Follow-up status

        

        
      


      

        

        
        

          
Rejecting Lead

          

          

        


        
        

          
          
          

        

      


      

        
        
      

    

  

  


  
  

    


      
      

        

          
Edit Manager Credentials

          

            Update username or reset password for this manager.
          

        

        
      


      
      

        
        
          Admin privilege — no current password required.
          The manager's current password is never shown.
          Leave a field blank to keep the existing value.

            Advisor: —%
              = ₹0

Rates apply when sales are approved. You can edit them anytime in Product Settings.


        

          
          

            New products are set to Active by default and appear in the lead capture dropdown immediately.

            Drag to reposition and zoom so the logo fits the frame. Circular certificates use a round crop area.

All fields are required unless marked optional

        

        
      


      
      


        
        

          
          
        


        
        

          

            
            
            

          

          

            
            
            

          

        


        
        

          
          
          

        


        
        

          

            
            
            

          

          

            
            
            

          

        


        
        

          
          
          

        


        

          
          
        


        
        

          

            
            
            

          


          

            
            
            

              
              
            

            
            

              

            

            

            

          

        


        
        

          Security note: Aadhaar is never stored in full — only the last 4 digits are saved.
          Passwords are hashed with SHA-256 (Web Crypto API) before saving to Firestore.
          For production deployments, use Firebase Authentication with bcrypt on a backend server.

A

New Manager

          Confirmation required: After clicking "Confirm Transfer", the advisor will be
          immediately reassigned. The Manager Detail view will update in real-time.

All fields are required

        

        
      


      
      


        
        

          
          
          

        


        
        

          
          
          

        


        
        

          

          
          

            
            

            
            

              
            


            
            
            
            

            
            
    
              
            

          


          


          
          

            
            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
Assigned Manager

          
—

          
This advisor will be linked to your manager account automatically.

        


        
        

          Relationship: The advisor is linked to the selected manager via their Firestore document ID
          (managerId). The manager's name and Emp ID are also stored for fast display.
          Changing a manager later requires editing the advisor record.
        


      


      
      

        
        
      


    

  

  


  
  

    

      

        

          
Align Header Banner

          

            Drag the image to set the focus area. Pinch or use +/− to zoom. Crop area matches the card header (3:1).
          

        

        
      

      

        

          
        

        

          
          Drag to reposition · Scroll or ± to zoom
          
        

        

          Scroll down if needed — Save Changes stays pinned at the bottom.
